# Status Directory

This directory provides optional static snapshots of framework status conventions.

## Primary Status Source

GitHub-native artifacts are the operational source of truth.

## Expected Status Visibility Without Editing Framework Internals

- What is completed: closed issues and merged PRs
- What is in progress: open PRs and active issue comments
- What remains: open issues, blocked labels, and dependency chains
- What follow-up exists: linked follow-up issues in PR/closure records
- What key decisions were made: issue/PR comments and review summaries

Normal runs should not require edits under `.github/status/`.
